# Pomme meson build options

option('pomme_no_graphics',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable graphics support',
)

option('pomme_no_input',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable input support',
)

option('pomme_no_mp3',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable MP3 support',
)

option('pomme_no_qd3d',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable QD3D support',
)

option('pomme_no_video',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable video support',
)

option('pomme_no_sound_formats',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable sound format support',
)

option('pomme_no_sound_mixer',
  type: 'boolean',
  value: false,
  description: 'Disable sound mixer support',
)
